tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Want To / Wanted To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Want To / Wanted To का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I want to learn this. I wanted to learn this. He wants to become a doctor. He wanted to become a doctor. We want to travel.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Want To / Wanted To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Want To / Wanted To का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We wanted to travel. I want to read this book. I wanted to read this book. She wants to do this job. She wanted to do this job.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "क्या तुम यह करना चाहते हो?"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Do you want to do this?

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "He wanted to become a doctor yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He wanted to become a doctor.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Want To / Wanted To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Want To / Wanted To का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: They want to achieve success. They wanted to achieve success. I want to take this opportunity. I wanted to take this opportunity.
